MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Saprina Hoang.
Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chanelya Thomas is present.
Attorney Amber Lu representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-30-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
